goal: Get a refund for a cancelled service, while talking over the agent

turns.user: Hi, I need a refund for the appointment you cancelled on me.
turns.agent: [warmly] Hello, thank you for calling our dental clinic! How can I help you book an appointment today? [briefly] I understand you're looking for a refund. I can't directly process refunds here, but I can connect you with someone who can help you with that. Would you like me to transfer you to our billing department?

turns.user: No listen, I don't want to rebook - I want my money back.
How long until it reaches my account?
turns.agent: [briefly] I... [briefly] I can't give you an exact timeframe for that, as I don't handle refunds directly. I can connect you with our billing department, who can provide you with that information. Would you like me to do that?
